See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 6822 => 'Rarotonga', 68231 => 'Aitutaki', 68233 => 'Atiu', 68234 => 'Mangaia', 68235 => 'Mauke', 68236 => 'Mitiaro', 68237 => 'Palmerston', 68241 => 'Pukapuka', 68242 => 'Penrhyn', 68243 => 'Manihiki', 68244 => 'Rakahanga', 68245 => 'Nassau', ];
